name: 7shifts Restaurant Scheduling API
what_it_does: 7shifts REST API for restaurant employee scheduling and workforce management platform. Enables AI agents to manage employee schedules, track time and attendance, process shift trades, handle tip pooling, sync employee data, and integrate scheduling with POS and payroll systems. 7shifts specializes in restaurant, bar, cafe, and hospitality industries.
use_cases: Creating and managing restaurant shift schedules from operations automation agents
Processing time and attendance from payroll integration agents
Syncing employee data with POS systems from restaurant technology agents
Analyzing labor costs and compliance from restaurant management agents
not_for: Non-restaurant industries without hospitality-specific scheduling needs
Retail scheduling without food service workflows (use When I Work or Deputy)
Enterprise corporate scheduling without hourly service worker focus
best_when: A restaurant group or hospitality operator wants AI agents to automate staff scheduling, track labor costs, and integrate workforce data with POS and payroll systems.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee scheduling and attendance data is personnel data. Tip pooling data may be considered sensitive financial information.

auth.notes: 7shifts uses OAuth 2.0 with authorization code flow for partner integrations. API keys available for direct integrations. Scopes available for granular access control.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan: 1 location, up to 30 employees
pricing.paid_tiers: Entree, The Works, and Gourmet plans per-location per-month with more locations and features
pricing.notes: Canadian company (Saskatoon). Restaurant-focused pricing per location. API access available on paid plans. POS integrations are key selling point.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth app; documented in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee scheduling and tip data is sensitive personnel information
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 or API key
Restaurant-specific data model: locations, departments, roles, shift templates
Labor compliance features (overtime, break rules) vary by jurisdiction
Canadian company — CA/US data residency; GDPR compliance for international operators
POS integration data model may vary by POS system connected
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee scheduling and tip data. SOC2, GDPR. Canadian company. OAuth2 with scopes. Jurisdiction-specific labor law features.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee and tip data. SOC2, GDPR. Canadian company. OAuth2.
